# resize

Resize the ShapeWithText.

Supported on:

*   [ShapeWithTextNode](/docs/plugins/api/ShapeWithTextNode/)

## Signature​

### resize(width: number, height: number): void

## Parameters​

### width​

New width of the node. Must be >= 0.01

### height​

New height of the node. Must be >= 0.01
